title: Choose a Game
summary: Use a question to choose what Python says.
mission_prompt: Ask a yes-or-no question, then make Python say the game is ready.
learning_goals: Use True as a yes value.
Run code only when the question is yes.
hints: if checks whether something is True.
The print line should be indented under the if.
adult_guidance: Use question language first, then name it as an if statement.
